content:
furriesは日本の「ケモナー」ですね😺
獣(kemono)が語源です

<@833036006798262326>
First of all, I'm not very good at English, so sorry if I make any mistakes.

To begin with, it seems like this game isn't very popular in Japan yet. There was a beta test for the Japanese audience just last month. Also, the in-game story appears to be AI-translated, so some parts are hard to understand.

The Rose of Versailles is a classic anime, but I feel like it's not very widely watched in recent years.
I personally like Agrippa's new skin — though I haven't bought it, haha.

I started playing this game because I really like its character design.
Actually, I also just started playing Reverse: 1999 yesterday!

Your English is perfect actually!

I heard about the beta test... It sounds like (part of) the reason Doresain is delayed is because the JP launch didn't go very well. They tried re-tuning the characters/wheels and added autoplay, which didn't play very intelligently. Also lol yeah the translation is done by AI in English as well; its kind of lame but I kind of like it, I think it makes me imagine a better story since you have to read between the lines + put things together for yourself 🤔🤷.

Reverse 99 is really good. It has a very painterly aesthetic and its pretty generous (as far as gachas go). There's no weapon banner or artifact system, and characters join the standard banner after three patches. Though of course in terms of generous gacha Limbus Company wins every time
リンバス NO.1! lol 

The writing in Reverse is pretty strong too in my opinion. よかったら、このゲームたちについて話しませんか?プロゲーマーじゃないですけど、両方をしばらくプレイしていて、よく知っています。<:hello:1356053084790460437>

I think in Japan, games with hard-to-understand stories tend not to become very popular. But the gameplay itself is really interesting, so I hope more people give it a try!

Also, I actually started making a Japanese wiki site for the game myself.

As for Limbus Company, I’ve seen my friend play it before.

But here in this chat, I’d like to keep the conversation focused just on morimens! If the devs found out, they might get mad at us lol.
あ! そうですか <:processing:1357185814567718963> 初耳ですよ。日本で、ケモナーはどんなイメージがありますか?西洋では、世間が多少恥ずかしい事だとおもいます。<:goodjob1:1356083729558274149>

Of course! No worries <:thumbsup:1356086340298473574> 

I always wondered about the fan wikis... So many people rely on them but few think about the work it takes to put one together <:sleep2:1356085993626665200>

Since this is a Japanese chat room, I'll speak in Japanese, okay? 🙂

一人ではかなり大変だと思いますが、ここにいる人たちに手伝ってもらおうと思っています！
